name: weather
title: Weather
summary: Current weather conditions and tomorrow's forecast via Open-Meteo and wttr.in. No API key required.

name: wikipedia
title: Wikipedia
summary: Search and retrieve articles from Wikipedia. Free, no API key required.

name: news_tool
title: News
summary: Search Google News for current headlines and multi-source coverage. No API key required.

name: reddit
title: Reddit
summary: Search Reddit for community discussions, opinions, recommendations, and troubleshooting. No API key required.

name: web_search
title: Web Search
summary: Search the web via DuckDuckGo. Privacy-focused, no API key required.

name: stackexchange
title: Stack Exchange
summary: Search Stack Overflow and 170+ Stack Exchange sites for Q&A on programming, sysadmin, science, and more. No API key required.

name: hackernews
title: Hacker News
summary: Search Hacker News for tech discussions, startup news, Show HN projects, and developer opinions. No API key required.

name: arxiv
title: arXiv
summary: Search arXiv for academic papers in CS, physics, math, and more. No API key required.

name: youtube
title: YouTube
summary: Search YouTube for videos or retrieve trending content. Optional API key for better reliability.

name: searxng
title: SearXNG
summary: Privacy-focused metasearch aggregating Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave, and more. Requires Docker.

name: google_account
title: Google
summary: Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Tasks integration. Requires Google OAuth credentials and Docker.
